overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring an industrial-style outfitter shop. The character walks through the dimly lit interior featuring metal shelving, a large holographic planet display, and an NPC sweeping the floor before approaching an exit door.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the industrial-style outfitter shop, walking past the main service counter toward a large holographic planet display glowing in the center of the room. Metal shelving lines the walls under fluorescent ceiling lights.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the holographic display, the character enters the back storage area where metal shelves line the walls. A shop worker is sweeping the floor in the corner as the character approaches, with a clothing rack and exit door visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking past the sweeping NPC and approaching the exit door at the back of the shop

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the sweeping worker in the rear corner, moving toward the large illuminated exit door. A clothing rack with blue garments and a wall clock are visible as the character approaches the doorway to exit the shop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial outfitter shop that transitions from a public service area to a restricted storage exit. It begins as the character enters the shop, moving past a main service counter and metal shelving toward a glowing holographic planet display in the center of the room. As the camera pushes past the hologram, the environment shifts into a back storage area where the lighting remains fluorescent and a shop worker is seen sweeping the floor in the corner. The scene then opens further toward the rear of the shop, passing the worker and a clothing rack of blue garments. Finally, the camera moves past a wall clock and approaches a large illuminated exit door to leave the premises.
